snov_prison.updateNotes: Fixed some bugs, more robust item confiscation and more configurables

snov_stretcher.updateNotes: Small Bugfix regarding stretcher load/unload due to Vehicle Flags

snov_cuffs.updateNotes: complete rework of interaction system, added unconscious check for search

snov_sperrzone.updateNotes: automatic npc clearing & type specific zones

snov_jobs.updateNotes: Capped the ox_target interaction distance to 2m (per-option) so points (storage, staff management, duty, doorbell) no longer trigger from far away.

snov_farming.updateNotes: Clearer farming error messages (depleted zones now show the correct message instead of a generic failure); fixed hidden skills leaking into the skills menu

snov_evidence.updateNotes: Petrol can, fire extinguisher and other non-firearm weapons no longer leave endless bullet casings and projectiles in the ballistics evidence system.

snov_license.updateNotes: Written firearms theory exam at the Ammu-Nation replaces the pay-and-receive weapon_training: a custom NUI form drawn from the Waffengesetz, server-graded with an on-screen result breakdown and a non-refundable attempt fee. Passing files an official, stamped Ammu-Nation certificate into the citizen's inventory (via snov_documents), with an NPC reprint for lost copies.

snov_mdt.updateNotes: Mass arrest: one arrest report now collects and bills all of a person's open cases (junction-based, one-click warrant execution while booking). SVPD can issue and renew weapon permits from the person file (new issue_licenses permission; prior convictions raise a non-blocking medical-assessment warning). Custody status is now derived from the report type - the manual toggles are gone; fixed incident reports being blocked from approval by an orphaned bail decision.

snov_banking_billing.updateNotes: Employee salaries are now paid straight from the faction bank account via a dedicated export used by snov_jobs.

snov_documents.updateNotes: Photocopies can now be filed into the binder and stay flagged as copies (fixed filed/extracted copies being converted to originals).
